examples.title: Calculating Accuracy
examples.description: Calculating the proportion of correctly classified instances out of all instances in the test dataset
examples.explanation: This code calculates the accuracy of a classification model by dividing the sum of true positives and true negatives by the total number of instances in the test dataset.

examples.title: Calculating Precision
examples.description: Calculating the proportion of true positives out of all positive predictions made by the model
examples.explanation: This code calculates the precision of a classification model by dividing the number of true positives by the sum of true positives and false positives.
